extortion.description: www.algorithmica.se https://www.zoominfo.com/c/algorithmica-research/1179714 Algorithmica Research is founded in 1994 with the mission of creating innovative software for quantitative financial analysis and haven’t looked back since. Well established in northern Europe, Algorithmica has an extensive client list including top tier financial institutions. They are partner owned and has been profitable since inception, enjoying a “Triple A” credit rating from Dun & Bradstreet. Algorithmica successfully combines leading edge competence in quantitative finance and software development. They are committed to academic work on all levels, and actively sponsor research, student activities and courses in quantitative finance.
